cold_outreach.subject: Premium {domain} — Perfect Fit for {company}
cold_outreach.body:
Hello {first_name},

I hope you're doing well.

I noticed that your company operates in the {niche} space, and I wanted to reach out because I currently own the domain **{domain}**, which I believe could be a strong fit for your brand.

The domain is short, memorable, and highly relevant to your business. It could help strengthen your online presence, improve brand recognition, and provide a premium digital asset for future growth.

If this is something your team might be interested in, I'd be happy to discuss details and pricing.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Khalid Khan
Email: khalid.khan46571@gmail.com
Contact: 03019883536

followup.subject: Re: Premium {domain} — Quick Follow-Up
followup.body:
Hello {first_name},

I hope this message finds you well.

I'm following up on my previous email regarding **{domain}**. I understand you're busy, so I'll keep this brief.

I have a few other interested parties, but I wanted to give you first refusal given your work in the {niche} space. The domain is still available at this time.

If you'd like to discuss how {domain} could benefit {company}, I'm happy to connect at your convenience.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,

Khalid Khan
Email: khalid.khan46571@gmail.com
Contact: 03019883536
